creator: nbe@renzel.net
text:
I'm so and deeply embarrassed right now. Just opened the laptop to check if the cards are somewhat different in hardware revisions/batches.

And you know what? One of the antenna cables was disconnected. I've reconnected it, and now everything works as on the other laptop...

Many, many apologies for my noise. Unfortunately, there is no resolve status "user dumb dumb" so I've chosen "Not A Bug" as resolve status for this ticket...
